description_long: This is a humanoid figure dressed in rugged, utilitarian attire, featuring a sleeveless shirt, reinforced arm bracers, and cropped pants with leather straps and harnesses. The head is covered by a distinctive, angular helmet or mask that obscures the face, giving the figure a mysterious or possibly protective appearance. The arms are muscular and exposed, with leather bracers strapped tightly around the forearms, while the hands are bare. The lower legs are protected by shin guards and the feet are encased in pointed, armored footwear, suggesting a readiness for combat or hazardous environments. The outfit is detailed with multiple buckles, straps, and metallic elements, indicating a blend of functionality and style. The overall look is reminiscent of a post-apocalyptic or fantasy urban survivor, blending elements of armor and streetwear.
description: A muscular adult figure in rugged, strappy attire with a full head mask, armored bracers, and pointed footwear, exuding a post-apocalyptic or fantasy urban survivor vibe.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full mask, sleeveless shirt, harness, exposed arms, and detailed bracers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the helmet, arm bracer, and the layered, strapped pants and footwear.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back harness, the structure of the bracers, and the back of the cropped pants and shin guards.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the helmet's side, arm bracer, and the pointed footwear.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless utility shirt, cropped pants with harness and straps, reinforced arm bracers, angular helmet or mask, shin guards
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended
